jobDescription: Algolia is looking for a marketing demand generation expert who loves developing and executing demand generation strategies and programs that are built upon operational excellence, driven by data and show measurable impact. Are you capable of driving a global campaign strategy that rallies marketing, product and sales around common go-to-market objectives? Can you manage marketing automation, data management and analytics? If so, we want to talk to you! The ideal candidate will understand what it takes to attract and qualify leads, be accountable for critical pipeline and conversion targets and work in a highly collaboratively environment to successfully align with company objectives and desired outcomes. Are you a resilient problem solver who isn't afraid to think outside the box and get their hands dirty? We expect you to take ownership and be able to execute without defined processes and implicit direction. We're looking for candidates who raise the level of our teams. You should value and practice transparency, have the humility to accept your weaknesses and continuously strive to improve both personally and professionally. Are you ready for the challenge? YOUR ROLE WILL CONSIST OF: Campaign Planning and Results - Develop and execute actionable high-performing campaign plans that can scale with a clear focus on quality, execution and results. Includes targeting and segmentation, funnel analysis, lead management, strategy and messaging, execution and scorecard. Marketing automation – Own implementation and execution of marketing automation solution. Create strategy, framework and best practices. Lead Funnel Optimization – Create, monitor and consistently improve lead scoring and lead flow. Collaborate and develop nurture tracks based on audience segmentation - personas, behaviors and lead stages. Database Audits - Measure and maintain high levels of marketing readiness in email deliverability, database segmentation and database health & integrity. Track, Measure and Refine - Measure the metrics, capture and provide business insights and consistently report impact. Always look for ways to improve conversions and revenue results. YOU MIGHT BE A FIT IF YOU HAVE:5+ years of marketing campaigns experience Experience aligning demand gen with overall marketing efforts Foster a cooperative team spirit when working with others Advanced marketing automation experience and execution proficiencies - Marketo, Hubspot, Eloqua, Pardot, etc. ( Pardot preferred) Proven experience setting marketing automation vision and executing on roadmap Solid experience executing automated marketing nurture campaigns Focus on analytics and data driven decisions Experience developing and optimizing B2 B demand gen logic and reporting Solid business sense balanced with technical aptitude Strong communication skills Service-oriented attitude and ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment Travel when needed WE' RE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO CAN LIVE OUR VALUE: GRIT - Problem-solving and perseverance capability in an ever-changing and growing environment. TRUST - Willingness to trust our co-workers and to take ownership. CANDOR - Ability to receive and give constructive feedback. CARE - Genuine care about other team members, our clients and the decisions we make in the company. HUMILITY - Aptitude for learning from others, putting ego aside.
